opportunities.title: UNBOUND 2026 (formerly INBOUND)

opportunities.fit_reason: Draws 12,000+ marketing, sales, and RevOps leaders and explicitly seeks sessions using storytelling to build trust and credibility, aligning directly with a trust-based sales coach's message.

opportunities.title: OutBound Sales Training & Leadership Conference 2026

opportunities.fit_reason: A premier sales training and leadership event for individual contributors and leaders alike, with a dedicated new Leadership Summit day perfect for a trust-based selling and sales culture keynote.

opportunities.title: Pavilion CRO Summit 2026

opportunities.deadline: Pavilion members only; contact Pavilion for speaker consideration
opportunities.fit_reason: Gathers CROs, VPs of Sales, and GTM executives for real conversations rather than vendor pitches, a strong audience for a trust-based B2B sales culture message.

opportunities.title: Sistas in Sales Summit & Gala 2026

opportunities.fit_reason: An intimate retreat-style gathering of sales leaders built on shared experience, trust, and respect - directly aligned with trust-based selling and culture themes.
